Strip_Summary: Laptop screen showing $26B figure glowing in dark room. Largest number ever.
Subject gazing at screen. Not seeing money - seeing validation of everything.
Bold countdown text '72 HOURS' against digital timer. Zero approaching.
You just don't know that yet.
Stickman in ill-fitting suit standing in bright federal courtroom. Rigid posture.
Stickman in cargo shorts at congressional podium. Suited officials watching.
Nobody thought that was a problem.
You thought you could fix it before anyone noticed.
You gambled with eight million people's money. And you lost.
University campus, tree-lined paths, faculty housing. Child stickman with books.
Family dinner table. Two professor parents, child between them. Debate in progress.
Classroom. Child stickman finishing test first while others still writing.
Stickman reading textbook at desk. Teacher at board turning away, corrected.
Cafeteria. Another kid approaching subject's lonely corner table uncertainly.
Stickman walking away from cafeteria alone. Empty tray behind. Isolation visible.
Split: left side messy social scene; right side clean equations on chalkboard.
Teen stickman at desk, reading philosophy website at 2am. Blue screen glow.
Bedroom at night. Website text glowing: money flowing toward charitable causes.
Infographic: dollar sign connected to malaria net icons. Clean math equation.
Comparison scale: stickman figure towering over doctor and politician icons.
Stickman at desk, numbers and morality arrows converging. Golden light moment.
Text forming in warm light: 'MAXIMIZING IMPACT'. Faint courtroom shadow behind.
Subject silhouetted in doorway. Bright path ahead, unseen shadow behind.
Graduation scene. Stickman in cap and gown walking away from university gates.
Wall Street trading floor. Rows of monitors, suited figures. Subject at desk.
Market visualization showing price gaps between exchanges. Subject finding cracks.
Subject at trading desk, wrists flat on cold surface. Outperforming room.
Split: narrow Wall Street price gaps left vs. wide crypto gaps right. Uncollected.
Subject walking out of corporate office. Boss watching from doorway. Age 25.
Cramped apartment. Mattresses on floor, monitors on every surface, noodle cups.
Four stickmen in apartment, some sleeping on floor mattresses. Clock past midnight.
Subject at center of glowing screen array. Building a machine. Late night glow.
Spreadsheet showing green numbers aligning. Subject nodding to self. Math checks out.
Revenue counter climbing past hundreds of millions. Market cracks filling with money.
Subject outpacing blurred competitors. Philosophy motto 'EARN TO GIVE' above.
Split screen: left shows profit charts climbing; right shows charity donation tracker.
Subject alone at desk, validating numbers. No one forcing him. Self-satisfied pose.
Tropical island aerial view. Modern penthouse building against Caribbean ocean.
Penthouse balcony with ocean view. Subject turned away, facing screens indoors.
Penthouse interior: people living/working/dating. Label: 'OPTIMIZING' not luxury.
AC running, screens never off. Subject on beanbag surrounded by blue glow.
Subject waking on beanbag. Screens still running around him. Normalized chaos.
Conference room. Suited investors signing documents. $400M then $2B flowing in.
Magazine covers featuring subject. Headlines glowing. Bookmarked articles on screen.
Congressional hearing. Subject at podium in cargo shorts. Senators calling him responsible.
Close-up: subject's hand on game controller. Meeting audio from adjacent screen.
Subject playing game on one screen while board call on another. Dismissive posture.
Awkward handshake in formal hallway. Subject's stiff body language. Too long.
Two political podiums receiving equal money flows from subject in center.
Subject surrounded by floating equations. People and dollars connected by calculation lines.
Subject at whiteboard of equations, gesturing to confused listener. Failed explanation.
Subject's daily routine loop: same meal, same cargo shorts, same desk. Optimized life.
Subject tapping table edge nervously. Penthouse cluttered with screens and cables.
Hidden screen showing red numbers. Trading firm losses accumulating behind facade.
Trading models on screen diverging sharply from reality chart. Red indicators flashing.
Visual metaphor: dark pit growing larger. Dollar signs flowing in from customer accounts.
Subject's rationalization: arrows labeled 'borrow' flowing between exchange and firm.
Time-lapse: morning/afternoon/night at same desk position. Everyone else asleep.
Cold coffee cup on desk untouched. Blue screen light on forgotten mug.
Computer screen showing code with hidden doorway icon. Subject and co-founder.
Two buildings connected by hidden tunnel. $8B flowing as glowing stream through secret path.
Penthouse group: girlfriend, co-founder, best friend. Everyone looking away. Shared silence.
Subject staring at spreadsheet. Numbers look correct on paper. Cognitive dissonance.
Subject alone, shoulders tense near ears. Seeing himself as only one smart enough.
Close-up: shoulders rising back up involuntarily. Stress manifesting physically.
Subject between growing pit and sealed door. Cannot stop. Cannot confess. Trapped.
Telling people means admitting you were wrong from the beginning.
Subject looking at imagined ending. Real ending forming as dark shadow on opposite wall.
Phone screen showing competitor's social media post. Balance sheet numbers exposed.
Subject gripping phone, screen too bright. Pulse visible in wrist. Panic rising.
Withdrawal counter spinning: $6B draining in 72 hours. Vault shown empty. Red warnings.
Penthouse at night. Multiple stickmen sitting in dead silence. No games on screens.
Subject hunched forward in penthouse. Hand on chest, heartbeat-skip moment. AC humming.
Subject reaching toward clock showing 24:00. Hand frozen mid-air. Cannot fix in time.
Subject on phone in dark room. Desperate posture. Calling competitor for rescue deal.
Boardroom: two sides of table. Deal documents open. Team sees the hole. Walking away.
The only person who could save you chooses to watch you sink.
Exchange screens going dark one by one. Phone showing 'assets are fine' while police approach.
Subject opening front door in cargo shorts. Police officers outside. Blue-red lights.
Federal courthouse exterior. Subject in handcuffs escorted inside. Wood and paper smell.
Witness stand sequence: co-founder, engineer, best friend testifying one after another.
Ghost overlay: penthouse dinner memory fading behind current courtroom testimony reality.
Female stickman with glasses at witness stand. Subject looking down. Deepest betrayal.
Evidence documents spreading. Every number exposed. Every lie laid bare.
Trial day one: subject in borrowed suit arriving at courtroom bench. Four weeks ahead.
Subject adjusting too-tight tie. First clothing ever chosen by someone else. Discomfort.
Jail barber cutting wild curly hair short. No mirror offered. Identity being stripped.
Subject looking at own hands in courtroom. Words floating: FRAUD CONSPIRACY WIRE THEFT.
But nothing else does.
Two professor stickmen in courtroom front row. Every day. Stoic dignified posture.
Prosecutor projecting subject's old speeches on courtroom screen. Words turned into evidence.
Mother staring ahead rigid. Father taking notes mechanically. Subject's quotes as prosecution.
Subject trying to recall last family dinner. Memory fading, blurred, unreachable.
Subject's eyes fixed downward. Parents in peripheral blur. Deliberate avoidance.
Judge at elevated bench, gavel down. Subject motionless at defendant table. 25 years.
Subject's expression unchanged at sentencing. Still believing mistake. Everyone was wrong.
ID badge replacing name with defendant number. Lifetime identity stripped to digits.
Now you're just a defendant number.
Bare prison cell. Concrete walls, harsh fluorescent light. No screens, no controllers.
Empty cell inventory: no system to optimize, no one to save. Same-colored walls and ceiling.
Counter visual: $26B counting down to $0. Grey prison wall behind falling numbers.
Eight million tiny stickman silhouettes surrounding zero. Subject small at center.
Dark cell. Screen off. No glow on walls. No price, no spread, no system. Thin light under door.
Subject hunched in empty room. No philosophy to justify. Just quiet. Warm white edges fading.
You wanted to become the person who saves the world. You couldn't save yourself.
